name: Nith Saovdi
tagline: Growing greener spaces through plant care, gardening, and sustainable horticulture.
availability: Open to landscaping and horticulture opportunities
bio: I'm a dedicated Agricultural Science student at the Royal University of Agriculture with hands-on experience in landscape gardening, plant care, and sustainable horticulture. I specialise in garden maintenance and plant installation, and I love working in outdoor environments. I'm a reliable team player committed to delivering high-quality landscaping services and to learning something new on every project.
